name: Dolibarr Open-Source ERP/CRM REST API
what_it_does: Open-source ERP and CRM system with REST API — enabling SMEs to manage customers, invoices, quotes, orders, products, employees, and accounting via a PHP web application with built-in REST API, covering the full business cycle from lead management to payment tracking, with a modular plugin architecture and self-hosted or SaaS deployment.
use_cases: Managing Dolibarr customers and contacts via REST API for CRM integration and data sync
Creating and querying Dolibarr invoices and quotes via API for billing automation
Managing Dolibarr products and inventory via API for e-commerce backend integration
Querying Dolibarr order status and financial data via API for business reporting
Integrating Dolibarr with e-commerce platforms via API for order-to-invoice automation
not_for: Large enterprises needing SAP/Oracle-scale ERP (Dolibarr is SME-focused)
Teams needing real-time ERP integration without REST API knowledge
Teams without PHP hosting capabilities (requires PHP + MySQL/PostgreSQL)
best_when: A small to mid-market business needs a free, self-hosted ERP/CRM covering customers, invoicing, inventory, and basic accounting — with a REST API for custom integration with other systems.
avoid_when: You need enterprise-scale ERP (SAP, Oracle), complex manufacturing workflows, or want managed SaaS ERP without server administration.

auth.notes: API key authentication via DOLAPIKEY header. API key generated per user in Dolibarr. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes — API key inherits user permissions. No webhooks natively — use Dolibarr trigger hooks (PHP). REST API enabled via API module in Dolibarr. Self-hosted — user controls auth. OpenAPI explorer at /api/index.php/explorer. Multiple API keys possible (one per Dolibarr user).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free and open source (GPL v3)
pricing.paid_tiers: Dolibarr Cloud (managed SaaS) from $9/month; support plans available
pricing.notes: French project. Created by Laurent Destailleur in 2003. GPL v3 license. GitHub: Dolibarr/dolibarr (5,000+ stars). PHP 7+ + MySQL/PostgreSQL. Modular architecture (200+ modules). Popular in France, Spain, and broader European SME market. Dolibarr Cloud (SaaS) for managed hosting. 500,000+ installations worldwide. Available in 40+ languages. Full ERP modules: CRM, invoicing, quotes, orders, products, inventory, HR, accounting, projects. Community modules marketplace. Used by freelancers, SMEs, non-profits.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API via Dolibarr API module. DOLAPIKEY header auth. OpenAPI explorer at /api/index.php/explorer. No webhooks. No OAuth2. PHP expertise helpful. Self-hosted. No rate limits. GPL license. French open source community. API inherits user permissions.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Entity reads fully idempotent by ID. Customer reads idempotent. Invoice reads idempotent. Entity creation not idempotent — check by unique field. No built-in idempotency keys.
known_agent_gotchas: DOLAPIKEY header — non-standard auth header name
API module must be enabled in Dolibarr admin — not on by default
User permissions apply to API key — create dedicated API user with minimal permissions
No webhooks — must poll for changes or use scheduled sync
Self-hosted only in base version — must set up hosting for REST API access

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS depends on server config. User-controlled data residency. DOLAPIKEY header auth. User permission model for API scope. No OAuth2. Open source GPL — auditable. Self-hosted — user responsible for server hardening. No compliance certifications out-of-box. French project with GDPR awareness. Dedicated API user with minimal permissions recommended.
